title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: Nobody has watered the plants this week.

questions.firstSentence: It's possible that he forgot about the appointment.
The party was so crowded that we left early.
questions.secondSentence: It was (1) _________ that we left early.

questions.firstSentence: She established a new business last year.
questions.secondSentence: She (1) _________ a new business last year.

questions.firstSentence: She asked me, 'Are you feeling better?'
Without money, you can't buy food.
questions.secondSentence: If you had no money, you (1) _________ buy food.

questions.firstSentence: I have never tried paragliding before.
questions.secondSentence: This is (1) _________ I have tried paragliding.
